texto: Reality is a complex phenomenon, filled with dimensions, not the least of which are two that Christians affirm and understand: the physical and the spiritual. We are invited by Cervantes to enter into Don Quixote's imaginary world and reflect on these players. We are to ignore no points of view: neither the idealism of Don Quixote nor the realism/literalism of Sancho Panza. The point that comes across is this: we must not have a reductionist attitude toward reality.
explicacao: Orientação direta de RT Llizo sobre temas ligados a fe. A afirmação “Reality is a complex phenomenon, filled with dimensions, not the least of which are two that Chri…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, curiosity, openness, útil em momentos de openness e reality.

frase_original: Reality is a complex phenomenon, filled with dimensions, not the least of which are two that Christians affirm and understand: the physical and the spiritual. We are invited by Cervantes to enter into Don Quixote's imaginary world and reflect on these players. We are to ignore no points of view: neither the idealism of Don Quixote nor the realism/literalism of Sancho Panza. The point that comes across is this: we must not have a reductionist attitude toward reality.

texto: While we must not fall into the gnosticizing trap of seeing the world as only ideal, without any reference to the physical and tangible universe we inhabit, neither should we commit to crass literalism devoid of imagination and poetry.
explicacao: Orientação direta de RT Llizo sobre temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. A afirmação “While we must not fall into the gnosticizing trap of seeing the world as only ideal, without any …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a desenvolvimento-pessoal, mysticism, openness, útil em momentos de openness e worship.

frase_original: While we must not fall into the gnosticizing trap of seeing the world as only ideal, without any reference to the physical and tangible universe we inhabit, neither should we commit to crass literalism devoid of imagination and poetry.

texto: Poetry in the soul ennobles the insignificant. Something in us does yearn for the ideal.
explicacao: Citação de RT Llizo sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Poetry in the soul ennobles the insignificant. Something in us does yearn for the ideal.” articula reflexao, mysticism, worship em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como worship.
